sprint: Sprint 1: Session Lifecycle + OOB Auth Fix

tasks.title: Validate PID-capture shell wrapper on Unix and Windows
tasks.notes: pidWrapUnix/pidWrapWindows helpers + unit tests in tests/unit/pid-wrapper.test.ts. Committed c35aa77.

tasks.title: Add killPid to OsCommands interface + implementations
tasks.notes: killPid(pid) added to OsCommands interface, LinuxCommands (kill -9), WindowsCommands (taskkill /F /T). MacOSCommands inherits from Linux. activePid added to Agent type. getStoredPid/setStoredPid/clearStoredPid in agent-helpers.ts. All tests pass.

tasks.title: Wrap provider commands with PID-announcing shell wrapper
tasks.notes: buildAgentPromptCommand in linux.ts and windows.ts already call pidWrapUnix/pidWrapWindows (done in T1). Added FLEET_PID assertions to platform.test.ts to formally close T3.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 1 — PID Capture Foundation
tasks.notes: npm run build: clean. npm test: 52 test files, 889 passed, 7 skipped (platform-conditional), 0 failures. pidWrapUnix/pidWrapWindows verified on Windows (string tests always run, execution tests run on host platform). killPid commands correct. Agent.activePid compiles. PID store helpers tested. buildAgentPromptCommand output contains FLEET_PID wrapper for all providers.

tasks.title: Stream stdout in execCommand and parse PID line
tasks.notes: extractAndStorePid() in strategy.ts post-processes SSHExecResult from both RemoteStrategy and LocalStrategy. Scans stdout for FLEET_PID:<pid> line, calls setStoredPid, strips the line. 7 unit tests in tests/unit/pid-extraction.test.ts. Build clean, 899 tests pass.

tasks.title: Kill stored PID before retries and at start of new executePrompt
tasks.notes: tryKillPid() in src/utils/pid-helpers.ts. executePrompt kills stored PID before writePromptFile, before each retry, and clears PID on success. 4 unit tests added to execute-prompt.test.ts (kill-before-retry describe). Build clean, 903 tests pass.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 2 — PID Kill-Before-Retry
tasks.notes: npm run build: clean. npm test: 53 test files, 903 passed, 7 skipped (platform-conditional), 0 failures. T4 extractAndStorePid verified (7 unit tests). T5 tryKillPid verified (4 unit tests). All existing tests pass.

tasks.title: Implement rolling inactivity timer in stream watchdog
tasks.notes: Rolling inactivity timer in ssh.ts execCommand (resets on stdout/stderr data events). LocalStrategy migrated from exec to spawn in strategy.ts for streaming. max_total_ms hard ceiling added. 3 unit tests in tests/unit/inactivity-timer.test.ts. Build clean, 906 tests pass.

tasks.title: Update execute_prompt schema description and pass max_total_ms
tasks.notes: timeout_ms description updated to 'inactivity timeout'. max_total_ms optional param added to schema. Both passed through to all 3 strategy.execCommand calls (main + stale-session retry + server-error retry). Build clean, all tests pass.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 3 — Activity-Aware Timeout
tasks.notes: Approved per .fleet-task.md. T6 rolling inactivity timer verified (3 unit tests). T7 max_total_ms schema and pass-through verified. All tests pass.

tasks.title: Add stop_agent tool to fleet-mcp server
tasks.notes: stop-agent.ts created. Resolves member, calls tryKillPid, sets stopped flag via setAgentStopped, clears PID. Registered in index.ts under Agent Lifecycle section. 5 unit tests in tests/stop-agent.test.ts. Committed 0370402.

tasks.title: Prevent stopped agents from re-dispatching
tasks.notes: isAgentStopped/setAgentStopped/clearAgentStopped added to agent-helpers.ts. executePrompt checks isAgentStopped early, returns error and clears flag (so next explicit call proceeds). 3 unit tests in execute-prompt.test.ts. Committed e9021bb.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 4 — Background Agent Cancellation
tasks.notes: npm run build: clean. npm test: 55 test files, 914 passed, 7 skipped (platform-conditional), 0 failures. stop_agent kills PID + sets stopped flag (5 unit tests). executePrompt stopped-flag guard surfaces error once then clears (3 unit tests). No regressions.

tasks.title: Add display-presence detection helpers
tasks.notes: hasGraphicalDisplay() checks $DISPLAY/$WAYLAND_DISPLAY. hasInteractiveDesktop() checks SESSIONNAME=Console. Both exported from auth-socket.ts. 6 unit tests. Committed 9da5a57.

tasks.title: Skip GUI terminal on headless, show actionable instructions
tasks.notes: launchAuthTerminal checks hasInteractiveDesktop() on win32 and hasGraphicalDisplay() on linux before attempting GUI terminal. Returns fallback: with '! apra-fleet auth <memberName>' and no misleading cancelled error. 3 unit tests. Committed 9da5a57.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 5 — OOB Auth Fix
tasks.notes: npm run build: clean. npm test: 55 test files, 923 passed, 7 skipped (platform-conditional), 0 failures. hasGraphicalDisplay/hasInteractiveDesktop verified (6 unit tests). Headless fallback includes member name, no cancelled error (3 unit tests). GUI path unchanged. Pushed to origin/sprint/session-lifecycle-oob-fix.

tasks.title: Integration test — inactivity timeout + cancellation + OOB fallback
